title: rumex acetosa subsp. arifolius
intro: Rumex acetosa subsp. arifolius, also known as the wood sorrel or French sorrel, is a subspecies of the common sorrel plant. This perennial herb is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rumex acetosa subsp. arifolius include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in medicinal preparations.
